description: Click-to-edit inline text component. Displays a read-only value that switches to an input on click. Supports Enter to save, Escape to cancel, optional validation, and placeholder text.

parameters.name: OnSave
parameters.description: Fires when the user saves the edited value.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text when value is empty.

parameters.name: Validate
parameters.description: Optional validation function. Returns error message or null.

examples.title: Basic inline edit
examples.code:
<TmInlineEdit Value="@projectName" OnSave="name => projectName = name"
    Placeholder="Click to enter name" />

examples.title: Inline edit with validation
examples.code:
<TmInlineEdit Value="@title" OnSave="HandleSave"
    Validate="@(val => val.Length < 3 ? "Must be at least 3 characters" : null)" />
